sections.title: Before the player has finished the demonstration

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Wotcha guv'na!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hey! Talk to me if you want to know anything worth knowing.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Best talk to his highness over there, 'fore he goes gettin' upset.

sections.title: After the player has finished the demonstration

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Wotcha guv'na!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Zimberfizz.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What exactly is the Soul Obelisk?

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: It's 'ard to say. Me master never told what it is or why he built it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait a second... He built it?

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: I saw 'im build it with me own eyes. I were the one who 'ad to carry his materials to this island!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what is Nomad really up to?

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Well, me master is as secretive as they come. Af'er all my time here, I still know next to nuffin' about him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, what do you know?

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: He's been up to summat since I've been here, but 'e had to have been an adventurer at some point. He has a massive stockpile of loot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He seems to know his way around some strange creatures too.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: He does. He doesn't seem to care about that sorta stuff no more though. Since I've known 'im, he's only been obsessin' over gettin' as many people to play his game as possible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is he so obsessed?

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Lost if I know. Like I said, 'e's as secretive as they come.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me how you got to be here.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: I don't really know. I just woke up one day and 'ad to obey me master's commands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You just woke up here?

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Aye. All I can remember before that is a glowing box and sumfin' to do with beads.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It sounds like Nomad is quite the hunter.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: What makes you say that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I read somewhere that skilled hunters can capture imps.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: That's sad to hear. It's just so 'ard to ignore shiny beads when I see 'em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm quite the hunter myself, and some hunters like to capture imps.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Really? They abuse our love of beads just to test their skills?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No need to worry, I'll give you no hassle. I'm only here to chat.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Phew!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm quite the hunter myself, and I love capturing imps.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Oh no!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Only joking! I couldn't resist. Now, where were we?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: Bye!

sections.title: Attempting to attack another player's Zimberfizz or before instructed by Nomad

lines.speaker: Zimberfizz
lines.text: I can't really chit-chat with me Master 'round. Go see what he wants.
